images.caption: Figure 1:Impact of history length on predictive performance.Results illustrate the dependence between the volume of provided behavioral history (number of previous comments) and prediction quality. Shaded regions represent the standard deviation across 5 independent generation runs, while the underlying gray bars indicate the sample size distribution per length bucket. Analysis is based onLlama-3.1-8BinEnglishusing theHistory-Onlyconditioning strategy. The fine-tuned model was trained on a dataset of 3,800 users.
